surface: sai neg ha du chet tak-sha ras kei ren faz
gloss: Negative, high-arousal, medium-intensity chest tight-sharp rising state; high certainty; reactive source; freeze tendency.

surface: sai neg ma tri thal pres-buz ras meda ren avo
gloss: Negative, medium-arousal, high-intensity throat pressure-buzz rising state; medium certainty; reactive source; avoid tendency.

surface: sai mix ma du (thal?abdo) rawa osc li unu non
gloss: Mixed-valence, medium-arousal, medium-intensity uncertain throat-or-abdomen raw oscillating state; low certainty; unclear source; no clear action tendency.

surface: sai pos lo du abdo war-opa fal kei ren res
gloss: Positive, low-arousal, medium-intensity abdomen warm-open fading state; high certainty; reactive source; rest tendency.

surface: sai neu lo du heda grav-pres stan meda unu res
gloss: Neutral, low-arousal, medium-intensity head heavy-pressure static state; medium certainty; unclear source; rest tendency.

surface: sai neg ma du difa rawa-ø wav meda unu faz
gloss: Negative, medium-arousal, medium-intensity diffuse raw state with uncoded remainder, wave-like contour; medium certainty; unclear source; freeze tendency.
